title: Titan Eyeplus is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Titan Eyeplus is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Titan Eyeplus family as a E-commerce Executive in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Titan Eyeplus:
Titan Eyeplus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus!
